title: Lamb Zaalouk Tagine
description: A North African-inspired stew made with lamb, peppers, and eggplant in a rich and aromatic sauce.

ingredients.name: Moroccan peppery spice mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most spice shops or online

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown lamb in batches until browned, about 5 minutes per batch.
Remove lamb from pot, set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then sauté onion and garlic until softened.
Add bell pepper and eggplant, cook until tender.
Return lamb to pot, add zaalouk sauce and spice mix.
Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, or until lamb is tender.
